sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move UP to align with bar (rows 28-31)
# Current: player at rows 32-35, cols 21-23
# Bar at rows 28-31, cols 32-39

result = action(['UP'])
print(f"After UP: reward={last_action_result.get('reward', 0)}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Player: color={n['color']}, rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check bar position
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'g' and n['pixels'] >= 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Bar interior: color={n['color']}, rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Move RIGHT towards bar
# Player at cols 21-23, bar at cols 32-39
# Gap: cols 24-31 (8 columns)
# Each RIGHT: player moves 1 RIGHT, bar moves 1 LEFT
# After 4 RIGHTs: player at cols 25-28, bar at cols 28-35 (overlap at col 28!)

result = action(['RIGHT']*4)
print(f"\nAfter RIGHT x4: reward={last_action_result.get('reward', 0)}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Player: color={n['color']}, rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check bar position
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'g' and n['pixels'] >= 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Bar interior: color={n['color']}, rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check all targets
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'G'] and n['pixels'] == 12:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Target: color={n['color']}, rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>

        print(f"  Player: color={n['color']}, rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check bar position
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'g' and n['pixels'] >= 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Bar interior: color={n['color']}, rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check all targets
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'G'] and n['pixels'] == 12:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Target: color={n['color']}, rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")
